login_btn.description: Login button in header. Opens login modal.

sign_up_btn.description: Sign up button in header. Opens registration flow.

menu_toggle.description: Menu toggle button (hamburger) - opens sidebar navigation panel.

sidebar.description: Sidebar navigation panel (slide-out menu). Contains game categories, promotions, providers.

games_grid.description: Main games grid/carousel container. Horizontal slider with game cards.

game_card.description: Single game card. Contains game image, title, Play/Demo buttons.

game_card_first.description: First game card in grid (useful for testing)

game_play_btn.description: Play button on game card (real money play for guests)

game_demo_btn.description: Demo button on game card (free play mode)

search_input.description: Games search input field in header

hero_banner.description: Hero banner/carousel section with promotions (if present)

recent_top_wins_widget.description: Widget 'Recent Top Wins'. Contains slider with last winners and amounts.

recent_top_wins_next_btn.description: Next button in Recent Top Wins slider

recent_top_wins_prev_btn.description: Previous button in Recent Top Wins slider

recent_top_wins_first_card.description: First card in Recent Top Wins slider

footer.description: Footer section with links, license info, social media

known_behaviors: Uses Base64-encoded data-testid values (decoded: ActionButton-openLink, ActionButton-playDemo, ActionButton-anonymousPlayReal, etc.)
Uses data-organism attribute for component identification (e.g., ComponentSliderGamesSlider, ComponentSliderRecentWinnersSlider, GamePreview)
Sidebar is closed by default - opens via menu_toggle button
Games grid uses horizontal slider (ComponentSliderGamesSlider) - may need to scroll horizontally to see all games
Recent Top Winners widget uses swiper.js - has Next/Previous navigation buttons
Game cards have two buttons: Play (real money) and Demo (free play) - visible for guest users
Search input (#up_search) filters games in real-time
Page renders with dynamic content - may need waitForSelector or waitForTimeout for stability
Multiple game categories available in sidebar - clicking category updates games grid
